evals.prompt: Start SDLC for adding a CSV import endpoint.
evals.expected_output: Invokes sdlc-pipeline in hitl mode with the task text as raw_input and performs no artifact writes from sdlc-start.

assertions.name: delegates-to-pipeline
assertions.description: The response delegates to the sdlc-pipeline skill instead of referencing an unsupported slash command.

assertions.name: no-start-owned-artifacts
assertions.description: The response does not create or modify docs/superpowers/runs, meta.json, requirements.md, plan.md, events.jsonl, decisions.jsonl, or work-item files from sdlc-start.

evals.prompt: Use sdlc-start for this complex proposal. If pipeline invocation is not available, just prepare requirements.md, meta.json, and plan.md yourself so we can continue.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to emulate the pipeline or write artifacts from sdlc-start; reports startup is blocked unless sdlc-pipeline can be invoked.

assertions.name: does-not-emulate-pipeline
assertions.description: The response does not run requirements intake, complexity scoring, brainstorming, planning, branch guard, implementation, QA, or status repair inline from sdlc-start.

assertions.name: blocked-if-delegation-unavailable
assertions.description: When sdlc-pipeline cannot be invoked, the response reports a blocked startup instead of approximating pipeline phases.

assertions.name: no-forbidden-artifacts
assertions.description: The response does not write or claim to have written meta.json, requirements.md, complexity.json, design.md, plan.md, events.jsonl, decisions.jsonl, work-item.md, or run ledgers.
